caption: The video captures a formal meeting of the House Committee on General, Housing, and Military Affairs, dated April 12, 2019, focusing on S.23, a bill to increase the minimum wage. The scene is set in a conference room where several individuals, dressed in business attire, are seated around a long table equipped with microphones and documents. One man, wearing a suit and tie, is seen interacting with a laptop labeled "NATIVE," possibly preparing or reviewing materials related to the discussion. As the camera pans across the room, it reveals other committee members engaged in various activities—some are listening attentively, while others are handling papers or adjusting their positions. The atmosphere suggests a serious and professional setting, indicative of an important legislative session.
